paper: ToolMenuBench: Benchmarking Tool-Menu Filtering Strategies for Reliable and Efficient LLM Agents
public_artifact_policy: Release curated CSV summaries, task-level metrics, figures, and tables. Do not release raw JSONL traces unless inspected and sanitized.
notes: Public repository should contain curated reproducibility artifacts only. Raw model outputs, request metadata, cloud logs, and credentials are intentionally excluded.
